description: A perfect addition to your daily wardrobe, this sandal from catwalk is crafted from durable material in fashionable cuts to offer exemplary comfort without compromising on style.Heel: 1.5"UpperSynthetic leather straps on the forefoot and midfoot, with a strap connecting the two along the length, and has metallic embellishmentsPadded footbed with a faux suede lining for all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with patterned lugs and grooves on the forefoot and heel for absolute gripSandal careWipe surface with a clean and dry clothDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
